title: Progress Column Showing up over 100%
excerpt: Our progress column is the backbone of our Monday workflow. This is the one column that everyone shares throughout the company. It works 90% of the time, with percentages adding up to 100% as designed. However, lately we…

posts.author: rwilliams (Robert Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: Our progress column is the backbone of our Monday workflow. This is the one column that everyone shares throughout the company. It works 90% of the time, with percentages adding up to 100% as designed. However, lately we have been getting progress percentages over 100%. 170, 140, etc. It’s not possible in the settings, but it happens in our apps. Any ideas what’s happening?
